name: Potee De Millet
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil very hot and sauté the millet until light golden brown.
2. When it is light golden, add the chicken broth. Bring to a boil.
3. Simmer for 20 minutes stirring occasionally.
4. Meanwhile, sear the poultry in hot oil, season with salt, and keep warm.
5. Cook the vegetables in the fond (remaining liquid from cooking the millet) while stirring constantly, keeping them crisp-tender.
6. Season with soy sauce and cayenne pepper.
7. Add the millet and poultry to serve.
